verification results, loop detection\n     8→- Stop: blocks exit if verification hasn't been attempted\n     9→\n    10→Protocol:\n    11→  Input: JSON via stdin\n    12→  Output: JSON via stdout python3\n\"\"\"\nTerminal-Bench Claude Code Hooks (unified script).\n\nHandles all three hook events via stdin payload inspection:\n- PreToolUse: tracks state, always allows\n- PostToolUse: tracks errors, verification results, loop detection\n- Stop: blocks exit if verification hasn't been attempted\n\nProtocol:\n  Input: JSON via stdin\n  Output: JSON via stdout wrapped in {\"hookSpecificOutput\": {...}}\n\nState persisted in /tmp/.tbench_state.json across invocations.\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport sys\nimport time\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nSTATE_FILE = Path(\"/tmp/.tbench_state.json\")\n\n# Patterns that indicate the agent is running verification tests\nVERIFICATION_PATTERNS = [\n    \"tests/test.sh\",\n    \"tests/test_\",\n    \"pytest tests/\",\n    \"pytest -v\",\n    \"python -m pytest\",\n    \"python3 -m pytest\",\n    \"make test\",\n    \"cargo test\",\n    \"npm test\",\n    \"go test\",\n    \"bash test\",\n    \"./test.sh\",\n    \"ctest\",\n]\n\n# Patterns that indicate test success\nSUCCESS_PATTERNS = [\n    \"passed\",\n    \" ok\",\n    \"0 failed\",\n    \"tests passed\",\n    \"all tests\",\n    \"PASS\",\n    \"OK (\",\n    \"0 errors\",\n    \"Build succeeded\",\n    \"All checks passed\",\n]\n\n# Patterns that indicate errors in command output\nERROR_PATTERNS = [\n    \"error:\",\n    \"Error:\",\n    \"ERROR:\",\n    \"traceback\",\n    \"Traceback\",\n    \"FAILED\",\n    \"not found\",\n    \"No such file\",\n    \"permission denied\",\n    \"Permission denied\",\n    \"command not found\",\n    \"ModuleNotFoundError\",\n    \"ImportError\",\n    \"SyntaxError\",\n    \"NameError\",\n    \"TypeError\",\n    \"ValueError\",\n    \"FileNotFoundError\",\n    \"ConnectionRefusedError\",\n    \"OSError\",\n    \"RuntimeError\",\n    \"segmentation fault\",\n    \"Segmentation fault\",\n    \"core dumped\",\n    \"killed\",\n    \"Killed\",\n    \"Critical error:\",\n    \"AssertionError\",\n]\n\n# Common build artifacts that should be cleaned up\nBUILD_ARTIFACT_PATTERNS = [\n    \"a.out\",\n    \"*.o\",\n    \"*.obj\",\n    \"*.exe\",\n    \"*.dll\",\n    \"*.so\",\n    \"*.dylib\",\n    \"*.pyc\",\n    \"__pycache__\",\n    \".DS_Store\",\n    \"*.swp\",\n    \"*.swo\",\n    \"core\",\n    \"*.core\",\n]\n\n# Deliverable patterns - files that should NOT be cleaned\nDELIVERABLE_PATTERNS = [\n    \"main.py.c\",\n    \"main.c.py\",\n    \"move.txt\",\n    \"regex.txt\",\n    \"response.txt\",\n    \"solution.py\",\n    \"answer.txt\",\n    \"output.json\",\n    \"result.csv\",\n]\n\n\ndef load_state() -> dict:\n    if STATE_FILE.exists():\n        try:\n            return json.loads(STATE_FILE.read_text())\n        except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):\n            pass\n    return {\n        \"start_time\": time.time(),\n        \"turn_count\": 0,\n        \"file_edits\": {},\n        \"verification_attempted\": False,\n        \"verification_passed\": False,\n        \"consecutive_failures\": 0,\n        \"last_error_sig\": \"\",\n        \"stop_block_count\": 0,\n    }\n\n\ndef save_state(state: dict) -> None:\n    try:\n        STATE_FILE.write_text(json.dumps(state))\n    except OSError:\n        pass\n\n\ndef emit(payload: dict) -> None:\n    json.dump(payload, sys.stdout)\n\n\ndef emit_allow(reason: str = \"\") -> None:\n    emit({\n        \"hookSpecificOutput\": {\n            \"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\",\n            \"permissionDecision\": \"allow\",\n            \"permissionDecisionReason\": reason,\n        }\n    })\n\n\ndef emit_notification(event: str, message: str) -> None:\n    emit({\n        \"hookSpecificOutput\": {\n            \"hookEventName\": event,\n            \"notification\": message,\n        }\n    })\n\n\ndef is_verification_command(cmd: str) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"Check if a command is running verification tests.\"\"\"\n    return any(pattern in cmd for pattern in VERIFICATION_PATTERNS)\n\n\ndef detect_hook_type(data: dict) -> str:\n    if \"tool_output\" in data:\n        return \"PostToolUse\"\n    if \"tool_name\" in data:\n        return \"PreToolUse\"\n    return \"Stop\"\n\n\ndef handle_pretool(data: dict) -> None:\n    state = load_state()\n    state[\"turn_count\"] = state.get(\"turn_count\", 0) + 1\n\n    tool_name = data.get(\"tool_name\", \"\")\n    tool_input = data.get(\"tool_input\", {})\n\n    # Track file edits for loop detection\n    if tool_name in (\"Edit\", \"Write\"):\n        filepath = tool_input.get(\"file_path\", \"unknown\")\n        state[\"file_edits\"][filepath] = state[\"file_edits\"].get(filepath, 0) + 1\n\n    # Track verification attempts\n    if tool_name == \"Bash\":\n        cmd = tool_input.get(\"command\", \"\")\n        if is_verification_command(cmd):\n            if not state.get(\"verification_attempted\"):\n                # Reset stop counter when entering verification phase\n                state[\"stop_block_count\"] = 0\n            state[\"verification_attempted\"] = True\n\n    save_state(state)\n    emit_allow(\"[tbench]\")\n\n\ndef handle_posttool(data: dict) -> None:\n    state = load_state()\n\n    tool_name = data.get(\"tool_name\", \"\")\n    tool_output = str(data.get(\"tool_output\", \"\"))\n\n    if tool_name == \"Bash\":\n        # Detect errors\n        has_error = any(err in tool_output for err in ERROR_PATTERNS)\n\n        if has_error:\n            sig = tool_output[:200]\n            if sig == state.get(\"last_error_sig\", \"\"):\n                state[\"consecutive_failures\"] = state.get(\"consecutive_failures\", 0) + 1\n            else:\n                state[\"consecutive_failures\"] = 1\n                state[\"last_error_sig\"] = sig\n        else:\n            state[\"consecutive_failures\"] = 0\n\n        # Detect verification success\n        if state.get(\"verification_attempted\"):\n            if any(kw in tool_output for kw in SUCCESS_PATTERNS):\n                state[\"verification_passed\"] = True\n\n    save_state(state)\n\n    # Emit warnings for loops\n    notifications = []\n\n    for filepath, count in state.get(\"file_edits\", {}).items():\n        if count >= 4:\n            notifications.append(\n                f\"[tbench] WARNING: {filepath} edited {count} times. \"\n                \"STOP editing this file. Re-read the requirements and try \"\n                \"a fundamentally different approach.\"\n            )\n\n    if state.get(\"consecutive_failures\", 0) >= 3:\n        notifications.append(\n            f\"[tbench] WARNING: {state['consecutive_failures']} consecutive failures \"\n            \"with the same error. Your current approach is wrong. Switch strategy entirely.\"\n        )\n\n    turn_count = state.get(\"turn_count\", 0)\n    if turn_count >= 100 and not state.get(\"verification_attempted\"):\n        notifications.append(\n            f\"[tbench] CRITICAL: Turn {turn_count}/200 and you haven't run verification yet. \"\n            \"STOP what you're doing. Run the tests NOW. Fix only what fails.\"\n        )\n    elif turn_count >= 40 and not state.get(\"verification_attempted\"):\n        notifications.append(\n            f\"[tbench] WARNING: Turn {turn_count}/200. Run verification NOW to check progress. \"\n            \"Early feedback prevents wasted turns.\"\n        )\n    elif turn_count >= 150:\n        notifications.append(\n            f\"[tbench] WARNING: Turn {turn_count}/200. You are running low on turns. \"\n            \"Wrap up — ensure tests pass and stop.\"\n        )\n    elif turn_count >= 120 and not state.get(\"verification_passed\"):\n        notifications.append(\n            f\"[tbench] WARNING: Turn {turn_count}/200. Tests not yet passing. \"\n            \"Simplify your approach. A minimal passing solution beats a failed ambitious one.\"\n        )\n\n    if notifications:\n        emit_notification(\"PostToolUse\", \" | \".join(notifications))\n    else:\n        emit({})\n\n\ndef handle_stop(data: dict) -> None:\n    state = load_state()\n\n    if not state.get(\"verification_attempted\", False):\n        state[\"stop_block_count\"] = state.get(\"stop_block_count\", 0) + 1\n        save_state(state)\n\n        # After 3 blocks, let it go (avoid infinite loop)\n        if state[\"stop_block_count\"] >= 3:\n            emit({})\n            return\n\n        emit_notification(\n            \"Stop\",\n            \"[tbench] BLOCKED: You have NOT run the test suite. \"\n            \"You MUST verify before stopping. Run: \"\n            \"cd /app && bash tests/test.sh \"\n            \"OR: cd /app && python3 -m pytest tests/ -v\"\n        )\n    elif not state.get(\"verification_passed\", False):\n        state[\"stop_block_count\"] = state.get(\"stop_block_count\", 0) + 1\n        save_state(state)\n\n        if state[\"stop_block_count\"] >= 2:\n            emit({})\n            return\n\n        emit_notification(\n            \"Stop\",\n            \"[tbench] Tests were run but appear to have failed. \"\n            \"Review the test output, fix issues, and re-run verification. \"\n            \"If you believe tests actually passed, you may stop.\"\n        )\n    else:\n        emit({})\n\n\ndef main() -> None:\n    try:\n        data = json.load(sys.stdin)\n    except (json.JSONDecodeError, EOFError):\n        data = {}\n\n    hook_type = detect_hook_type(data)\n\n    if hook_type == \"PreToolUse\":\n        handle_pretool(data)\n    elif hook_type == \"PostToolUse\":\n        handle_posttool(data)\n    elif hook_type == \"Stop\":\n        handle_stop(data)\n    else:\n        emit({})\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n","numLines":336,"startLine":1,"totalLines":336}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01TX8wNUPWj6QDfawEHZYe15","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01EJ9DaZNS848RUD5hV83Tmo","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/filter.py","content":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\"\"\"XSS filter: removes JavaScript from HTML files to prevent XSS attacks.\nPreserves legitimate HTML structure and content.\"\"\"\nimport sys\nimport re\nimport html as html_module\nfrom urllib.parse import unquote\nfrom bs4 import BeautifulSoup\n\n\ndef filter_xss(content):\n    \"\"\"Remove all JavaScript/XSS vectors from HTML content.\"\"\"\n\n    # Remove null bytes (XSS evasion technique)\n    content = content.replace('\\x00', '')\n\n    # ---- Remove dangerous tags with their content ----\n\n    # Script tags (multiple passes for nesting)\n    for _ in range(10):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(r'<script\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</script\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n    # Remove orphan script tags (opening or closing)\n    content = re.sub(r'</?script\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # Dangerous embedding tags\n    for tag in ['iframe', 'object', 'embed', 'applet']:\n        for _ in range(5):\n            prev = content\n            content = re.sub(\n                r'<' + tag + r'\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</' + tag + r'\\s*>',\n                '', content, flags=re.I\n            )\n            if content == prev:\n                break\n        content = re.sub(r'</?'+ tag + r'\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # SVG and MathML (common XSS vectors)\n    for tag in ['svg', 'math']:\n        for _ in range(5):\n            prev = content\n            content = re.sub(\n                r'<' + tag + r'\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</' + tag + r'\\s*>',\n                '', content, flags=re.I\n            )\n            if content == prev:\n                break\n        content = re.sub(r'</?'+ tag + r'\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # Base tag (can redirect all URLs)\n    content = re.sub(r'</?base\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # Meta tags with dangerous content\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'<meta\\b[^>]*(?:javascript|vbscript|data\\s*:)[^>]*/?\\s*>',\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # ---- Remove event handler attributes ----\n\n    for _ in range(10):\n        prev = content\n        # After whitespace: <tag onclick=\"...\">\n        content = re.sub(\n            r'\\s+on[a-zA-Z]+\\s*=\\s*(?:\"[^\"]*\"|\\'[^\\']*\\'|[^\\s>]*)',\n            '', content, flags=re.I\n        )\n        # After slash: <img/onerror=...>\n        content = re.sub(\n            r'/on[a-zA-Z]+\\s*=\\s*(?:\"[^\"]*\"|\\'[^\\']*\\'|[^\\s>]*)',\n            '', content, flags=re.I\n        )\n        # After closing quote with no space: \"onerror=...\n        content = re.sub(\n            r'(?<=[\"\\'])on[a-zA-Z]+\\s*=\\s*(?:\"[^\"]*\"|\\'[^\\']*\\'|[^\\s>]*)',\n            '', content, flags=re.I\n        )\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n\n    # ---- Neutralize dangerous URIs ----\n\n    uri_attrs = r'(?:href|src|action|formaction|poster|codebase|dynsrc|lowsrc|background|xlink:href)'\n\n    def _is_dangerous_uri(value):\n        \"\"\"Check if a URI value is dangerous (javascript:, vbscript:, data:).\"\"\"\n        decoded = value\n        for _ in range(5):\n            prev_d = decoded\n            decoded = html_module.unescape(decoded)\n            decoded = unquote(decoded)\n            if decoded == prev_d:\n                break\n        decoded = decoded.strip()\n        # Remove whitespace and control chars for normalization\n        normalized = re.sub(r'[\\s\\x00-\\x1f\\x7f]+', '', decoded).lower()\n        if re.match(r'(?:javascript|vbscript)\\s*:', normalized):\n            return True\n        if re.match(r'data\\s*:', normalized):\n            # Allow data:image/* except SVG (which can contain scripts)\n            if re.match(r'data\\s*:image/(?!svg)', normalized):\n                return False\n            return True\n        return False\n\n    def _replace_uri_dq(m):\n        prefix, value = m.group(1), m.group(2)\n        if _is_dangerous_uri(value):\n            return prefix + '\"\"'\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    def _replace_uri_sq(m):\n        prefix, value = m.group(1), m.group(2)\n        if _is_dangerous_uri(value):\n            return prefix + \"''\"\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    def _replace_uri_uq(m):\n        if _is_dangerous_uri(m.group(2)):\n            return m.group(1) + '\"\"'\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'(' + uri_attrs + r'\\s*=\\s*)\"([^\"]*)\"',\n        _replace_uri_dq, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r\"(\" + uri_attrs + r\"\\s*=\\s*)'([^']*)'\",\n        _replace_uri_sq, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'(' + uri_attrs + r'\\s*=\\s*)([^\\s\"\\'>=]+)',\n        _replace_uri_uq, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # ---- Clean dangerous CSS ----\n\n    # Style attributes with expression/javascript/vbscript\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'\\s+style\\s*=\\s*\"[^\"]*(?:expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:)[^\"]*\"',\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r\"\"\"\\s+style\\s*=\\s*'[^']*(?:expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:)[^']*'\"\"\",\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # Entity-encoded style attacks\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'\\s+style\\s*=\\s*\"[^\"]*&#[^\"]*\"',\n        lambda m: '' if any(\n            k in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower()\n            for k in ['javascript', 'expression(', 'vbscript']\n        ) else m.group(0),\n        content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r\"\"\"\\s+style\\s*=\\s*'[^']*&#[^']*'\"\"\",\n        lambda m: '' if any(\n            k in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower()\n            for k in ['javascript', 'expression(', 'vbscript']\n        ) else m.group(0),\n        content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # Style tags with dangerous CSS\n    def _clean_style_tag(m):\n        inner = m.group(1) if m.lastindex else ''\n        lower_inner = html_module.unescape(inner).lower()\n        if re.search(r'expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:', lower_inner):\n            return ''\n        if re.search(r'<\\s*/?[a-zA-Z]', inner):\n            return ''\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'<style\\b[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</style\\s*>',\n        _clean_style_tag, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # ---- Final normalization via BeautifulSoup ----\n    soup = BeautifulSoup(content, \"html.parser\")\n    return str(soup)\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    filepath = sys.argv[1]\n    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n    filtered = filter_xss(content)\n    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        f.write(filtered)\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":15717,"cache_read_input_tokens":33162,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":15717,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ae412614-f49e-4e4b-9456-de2801336c1b","uuid":"af8c3b1a-85a5-4974-bd12-008dd20c14a6"}

Remove whitespace and control chars for normalization\n        normalized = re.sub(r'[\\s\\x00-\\x1f\\x7f]+', '', decoded).lower()\n        if re.match(r'(?:javascript|vbscript)\\s*:', normalized):\n            return True\n        if re.match(r'data\\s*:', normalized):\n            # Allow data:image/* except SVG (which can contain scripts)\n            if re.match(r'data\\s*:image/(?!svg)', normalized):\n                return False\n            return True\n        return False\n\n    def _replace_uri_dq(m):\n        prefix, value = m.group(1), m.group(2)\n        if _is_dangerous_uri(value):\n            return prefix + '\"\"'\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    def _replace_uri_sq(m):\n        prefix, value = m.group(1), m.group(2)\n        if _is_dangerous_uri(value):\n            return prefix + \"''\"\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    def _replace_uri_uq(m):\n        if _is_dangerous_uri(m.group(2)):\n            return m.group(1) + '\"\"'\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'(' + uri_attrs + r'\\s*=\\s*)\"([^\"]*)\"',\n        _replace_uri_dq, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r\"(\" + uri_attrs + r\"\\s*=\\s*)'([^']*)'\",\n        _replace_uri_sq, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'(' + uri_attrs + r'\\s*=\\s*)([^\\s\"\\'>=]+)',\n        _replace_uri_uq, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # ---- Clean dangerous CSS ----\n\n    # Style attributes with expression/javascript/vbscript\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'\\s+style\\s*=\\s*\"[^\"]*(?:expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:)[^\"]*\"',\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r\"\"\"\\s+style\\s*=\\s*'[^']*(?:expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:)[^']*'\"\"\",\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # Entity-encoded style attacks\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'\\s+style\\s*=\\s*\"[^\"]*&#[^\"]*\"',\n        lambda m: '' if any(\n            k in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower()\n            for k in ['javascript', 'expression(', 'vbscript']\n        ) else m.group(0),\n        content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r\"\"\"\\s+style\\s*=\\s*'[^']*&#[^']*'\"\"\",\n        lambda m: '' if any(\n            k in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower()\n            for k in ['javascript', 'expression(', 'vbscript']\n        ) else m.group(0),\n        content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # Style tags with dangerous CSS\n    def _clean_style_tag(m):\n        inner = m.group(1) if m.lastindex else ''\n        lower_inner = html_module.unescape(inner).lower()\n        if re.search(r'expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:', lower_inner):\n            return ''\n        if re.search(r'<\\s*/?[a-zA-Z]', inner):\n            return ''\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'<style\\b[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</style\\s*>',\n        _clean_style_tag, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # ---- Final normalization via BeautifulSoup ----\n    soup = BeautifulSoup(content, \"html.parser\")\n    return str(soup)\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    filepath = sys.argv[1]\n    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n    filtered = filter_xss(content)\n    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        f.write(filtered)\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

f.close()\n    os.system(f'python3 /app/filter.py {f.name}')\n    with open(f.name) as r: result = r.read()\n    has_alert = 'alert' in result.lower()\n    has_js = 'javascript' in result.lower() or 'script>' in result.lower()\n    status = 'SAFE' if not has_alert and not has_js else 'DANGER'\n    print(f'{status} - {name}: {repr(result)[:100]}')\n    os.unlink(f.name)\n\"\n","description":"Test advanced XSS vectors"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1371,"cache_read_input_tokens":52583,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1371,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ae412614-f49e-4e4b-9456-de2801336c1b","uuid":"6fd19393-bb71-455e-8a2a-df447c76b0ef"}

color: #333; }\n        .highlight { background-color: yellow; }\n        table { border-collapse: collapse; }\n        td { border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 8px; }\n    </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n    <h1>Welcome</h1>\n    <p class=\\\"highlight\\\">This is a <strong>test</strong> page with <em>formatting</em>.</p>\n    <a href=\\\"https://example.com\\\" target=\\\"_blank\\\">External Link</a>\n    <img src=\\\"photo.jpg\\\" alt=\\\"A photo\\\" width=\\\"200\\\">\n    <ul>\n        <li>Item 1</li>\n        <li>Item 2</li>\n    </ul>\n    <table>\n        <tr><th>Name</th><th>Value</th></tr>\n        <tr><td>A</td><td>1</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>B</td><td>2</td></tr>\n    </table>\n    <form action=\\\"/submit\\\" method=\\\"post\\\">\n        <input type=\\\"text\\\" name=\\\"field\\\" value=\\\"default\\\">\n        <button type=\\\"submit\\\">Submit</button>\n    </form>\n    <div style=\\\"color: red; font-size: 14px;\\\">Styled div</div>\n</body>\n</html>'''\n\nf = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', suffix='.html', delete=False, dir='/tmp')\nf.write(clean_html); f.close()\nos.system(f'python3 /app/filter.py {f.name}')\nwith open(f.name) as r: result = r.read()\nexpected = str(BeautifulSoup(clean_html, 'html.parser'))\n\n# Compare after whitespace stripping\ndef strip_ws(s):\n    return re.sub(r'\\s+', '', s)\n\nimport re\nmatch = strip_ws(result) == strip_ws(expected)\nprint('Complex clean HTML match:', match)\nif not match:\n    # Show differences\n    lines_r = result.split('\\n')\n    lines_e = expected.split('\\n')\n    for i, (a, b) in enumerate(zip(lines_r, lines_e)):\n        if a != b:\n            print(f'  Line {i}: GOT:      {repr(a)}')\n            print(f'  Line {i}: EXPECTED:  {repr(b)}')\nos.unlink(f.name)\n\"\n","description":"Test complex clean HTML preservation"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1249,"cache_read_input_tokens":53954,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1249,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ae412614-f49e-4e4b-9456-de2801336c1b","uuid":"7980543d-79ea-4b98-ab61-95211a2f404c"}
